title: Collection meta.json
description: Distribution metadata for one collection under collections/<author>/<slug>/.

author.description: Contributor GitHub login. CI verifies it equals the PR author and the path <author> segment.

slug.description: Collection slug. lowercase letters/digits/hyphens; no mc- prefix; no leading/trailing hyphen.

dataConsent.description: Required true when seed/ contains the contributor's real data — affirms ownership/consent to publish.
